use_cases: Form submission triggers with multiple visual variants
Call-to-action buttons in any UI context
Navigation actions with icon or text labels
Destructive action confirmations using destructive variant
Ghost-style secondary actions in toolbars or cards
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built on Radix UI primitives with class-variance-authority for variant management. Features 6 visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 size options (default, sm, lg, icon). Fully accessible with focus-visible ring states and disabled state handling. Styled with Tailwind CSS for consistent theming.
